//: P1.10 healthcheck config for the pick-BOARD service (Dockerfile.board: FastAPI + React SPA). This is the service that serves GET /api/health -> {"status":"ok"} (props/api/server.py, mounted before the SPA static mount so it is not shadowed). NOT the Streamlit dashboard service (root Dockerfile, ui/dashboard.py) which has NO /api/health, and NOT the Discord bot (Dockerfile.bot) whose health path is /health. Railway reads railway.json from the repo root per service by default; if a service needs a different config, point it at another file via the RAILWAY_CONFIG_FILE service variable. The board already sets RAILWAY_DOCKERFILE_PATH=Dockerfile.board (see BOARD_DEPLOY.md), which is why build.dockerfilePath is pinned here too.
